questions.topic: Family and Consumer Sciences: Budgeting
standardRefs: NYS Personal Finance
New York State P-12 Learning Standards
questions.prompt: In Family and Consumer Sciences, which concept is most central to the unit "Family and Consumer Sciences: Budgeting"?
questions.correctText: income
choices: expense
income
loan
wants
questions.explanation: income is a core idea in Family and Consumer Sciences: Budgeting. The related standard asks students to connect the concept to evidence, process, or application rather than treat it as a loose vocabulary word.

questions.topic: Family and Consumer Sciences: Budgeting

memorizing an isolated fact without evidence
Use evidence to explain expense.
questions.explanation: The useful move is to connect evidence to expense; this matches the standards/CED emphasis on reasoning and application.
